title: validateRoadmaps milestone validation runs independent of lens resolution — emergent in 5f852b1 without prior plan or authorization
body:
validateRoadmaps in packages/pi-context/src/roadmap-plan.ts (introduced in commit 5f852b1) runs the milestone-evidence and milestone-query checks (codes roadmap_milestone_evidence_block_missing at line 535, roadmap_milestone_query_invalid at line 552) without gating on the parent phase's lens-resolution outcome. A phase whose lens triggers roadmap_lens_missing or roadmap_composition_cycle still has its milestones validated; both classes of issues surface in the same validateRoadmaps result.

The plan at /Users/david/.claude/plans/idempotent-dancing-wilkes.md §'validateRoadmaps' specifies seven predicates but is silent on ordering between them. The independent-from-lens choice was made by the implementing subagent without prior planning entry or user authorization.
